evals.prompt: 帮我查看 Coding 上 aurora-photography 项目的所有仓库，然后看看 server 仓库的分支列表
evals.expected_output: Agent should run depot list to get project depots, then depot branches for the server repo

evals.prompt: 触发 Coding 上 chuanggo-service 项目的 CI 构建任务，用 main 分支，然后帮我看看构建日志
evals.expected_output: Agent should list CI jobs to find the right one, trigger build with --ref main, then poll/show build log

evals.prompt: 查看 Coding 制品库里 docker 仓库中 aurora-server 的最新版本和下载地址
evals.expected_output: Agent should list artifact repos (filter docker), then list versions for aurora-server, then get download URL
